Ad Text:
What will you do on your journey with WebBeds?

WebBeds is the world’s second largest accommodation supplier to the travel industry. We are a global company offering ground services (hotels, transfers, tours, activities) to travel professionals. Our products cover our full business needs, from distribution APIs, payment integrations, SAP integration, Data Lakes, User Interfaces, and others. Our search API reach peaks of more than 50.000 request per second, each one with tens or hundreds of hotels. And those numbers are growing every year.

"We design, deliver and support innovative solutions through engagement, collaboration and a fearsome passion for creating customer value" is our mission as an IT organization.

With this in mind, we strive to be at the leading edge of technology when it comes to build the platform that meets the needs of our customers. This translates to the use of latest .NET Core versions, K8S, microservices architecture, multiple clouds, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing or great monitoring and alerting systems, to name a few.

Our delivery teams have the creativity and freedom to express themselves by building innovative solutions to often complex problems and are challenged to reach higher levels daily. Our teams consist of product owners, QA engineers, Software Engineers, and people from across the business all working collectively and collaboratively. We have a very strong technical team from which you will be able to learn but are encouraged by new ideas and fresh thinking that you will bring with you.




How will you make an impact?

As a Security Analyst, you will be responsible for utilising the data available to us to help optimise mitigation controls, prioritise initiatives, identify key risk areas and help understand our threat landscape better. You will also be responsible for optimising our threat intelligence function through analysing internal and external data sources.




Key elements to this role include, but not limited to:

Assess organizational risk and recommend mitigating controls

Review relevant data sources to develop an understanding of key internal and external threats.

Review data from security applications to identify key risk areas and optimise mitigation controls.

Understand our threat landscape and share those insights with key business stakeholders.

Utilise data to help prioritise road map items.

Apply threat intelligence to improve detection and defences

Recommend security controls to improve existing procedures following data analysis.

Produce regular security reports for management

Maintain records of incidents, assessments, and remediation actions




The skills we would love to see in your suitcase!

Strong analytics skills.

Be familiar with cloud environments such as Azure, M365, AWS.

Be familiar with security tools and technologies (e.g. SIEM, EDR, Anti-malware, email security, Cloud security platforms)

Have the ability to communicate in a non “techie” way to articulate the risk.

Be aware of the Threat Landscape, current trends and current attacks.

Have strong communication skills and be comfortable providing feedback and updates to key stakeholders within the business.

Enjoy finding solutions to problems and working effectively with others to reach an agreement.

Have a professional approach to work, integrity, and respect for policies.

Be driven and eager to continuously learn and improve.
